revision.text: {{Game |Guid=efb63b9f-511b-4bbd-b4c8-6fcc6e7642be |Name=Arcane Eats |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--library_600x900_2x-06-08-2026.jpg |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--library_hero_2x-06-08-2026.jpg |Deck=A roguelike deckbuilder about creating the top cooking guild in the land. |ReleaseDateType=Year |YearPart=2026 |Concepts=Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Indie, Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/2D, Concepts/Roguelike, Concepts/Cooking |Developers=Companies/Wonderbelly Games |Genres=Genres/Strategy |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Skystone Games |Themes=Themes/Fantasy }}

{{Game |Guid=c2977e5a-911f-409a-9764-662b1e03b3ef |Name=Aretha Collection 1993-1995 |Deck=Aretha Collection 1993-1995 is a compilation of three Super Famicom games in the Aretha series. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-07-30 |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution |Developers=Companies/Edia, Companies/Japan Art Media |Franchises=Franchises/Aretha |Genres=Genres/Compilation, Genres/Role Playing |Platforms=Platforms/PlayStation 4, Platforms/PlayStation 5, Platforms/Nintendo Switch |Publishers=Companies/Edia |Themes=Themes/Anime, Themes/Fantasy }} '''Aretha Collection 1993-1995''' is a compilation of three games, released on the [[Platform/PlayStation_4|PlayStation 4]], [[Platform/PlayStation_5|PlayStation 5]], and [[Platform/Switch|Switch]] on July 30, 2026 in Japan. While the PS5 and Switch versions received physical and digital versions, the PS4 version is digital only.
The games included on the compilation are: *'''[[Games/Aretha|Aretha the Super Famicom]]''' *'''[[Games/Aretha_II_Ariel_no_Fushigi_na_Tabi|Aretha II: Ariel no Fushigi na Tabi]]''' *'''[[Games/Rejoice_Aretha_Oukoku_no_Kanata|Rejoice: Aretha Ōkoku no Kanata]]'''

For mobile devices this is the first release of the game. |ReleaseDateType=Year |YearPart=1997 |Characters=Characters/Arthur_Read |Concepts=Concepts/Licensed_Game |Developers=Companies/Living_Books, Companies/Wax_Tadpole_Productions |Franchises=Franchises/Arthur |Genres=Genres/Educational |Platforms=Platforms/Android, Platforms/iPad, Platforms/iPhone, Platforms/Mac, Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Broderbund_Software_Inc, Companies/Google, Companies/Jordan_Freeman_Group, Companies/Wanderful_Inc |Themes=Themes/Fantasy }} <div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3461790-2217366285-16997.png","path":"7\/73970\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,square_medium,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_tiny,scale_small,scale_avatar,square_mini,scale_medium,square_avatar,square_small,square_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> An updated release of the 1994 game Arthur's Birthday. For mobile devices this is the first release of the game.

{{Game | Name=Ash | Guid=3030-33261 | Deck=Ash is a JRPG developed originally for iOS by SRRN Games, similar to Square's SNES-era RPGs. The game is receiving exceptionally strong reviews for an iPhone-native game. A 3DS port is currently in the works. | ReleaseDate=2010-11-09 | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Original_Soundtrack_Release,Concepts/PAX_East_2012,Concepts/Single_Word_Titles | Developers=Companies/SRRN_Games | Franchises= | Genres=Genres/Role_Playing | Locations= | Objects= | Platforms=Platforms/iPhone,Platforms/Nintendo_3DS_eShop | Publishers=Companies/Circle_Entertainment,Companies/SRRN_Games | Games= | Themes=Themes/Fantasy | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/165036/3006309-sq_3dsds_ash.jpg }}

{{Credits |ParentPage=Games/Ballistik }} {{CreditSubobject |Game=Games/Ballistik |Release= |Dlc= |Person=People/Denis_Shishkin |Company= |Department=Unclassified |Role=Programming }} {{CreditSubobject |Game=Games/Ballistik |Release= |Dlc= |Person=People/Konstantin_Shishkin |Company= |Department=Unclassified |Role=Art and Level Design }} {{CreditSubobject |Game=Games/Ballistik |Release= |Dlc= |Person=People/Viktoria_Shishkina |Company= |Department=Unclassified |Role=Art and Level Design }} {{CreditSubobject |Game=Games/Ballistik |Release= |Dlc= |Person=People/Konstantin_Elgazin |Company= |Department=Unclassified |Role=Music }} {{CreditSubobject |Game=Games/Ballistik |Release= |Dlc= |Person=People/Israel_Evans |Company= |Department=Unclassified |Role=Art Director }} {{CreditSubobject |Game=Games/Ballistik |Release= |Dlc= |Person=People/Matt_Hayhurst |Company= |Department=Unclassified |Role=Artist }} {{CreditSubobject |Game=Games/Ballistik |Release= |Dlc= |Person=People/Daniel_Bernstein |Company= |Department=Unclassified |Role=Sound and Music }} {{CreditSubobject |Game=Games/Ballistik |Release= |Dlc= |Person=People/Andrew_Megowan |Company= |Department=Unclassified |Role=Technical Director }} {{CreditSubobject |Game=Games/Ballistik |Release= |Dlc= |Person=People/Andrew_Lum |Company= |Department=Unclassified |Role=Testing }}

{{Game | Name=Balrum | Guid=3030-54458 | Deck=An isometric, open world, turn-based RPG in which players build a home and farm while attempting to unlock the secrets of the world outside their safe and isolated village. Originally funded on Kickstarter. | ReleaseDate=2016-03-01 | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Crafting,Concepts/Dialogue_Tree,Concepts/Farming,Concepts/GOG_com,Concepts/Kickstarter_Funded,Concepts/Mining,Concepts/Single_Word_Titles,Concepts/Tactical_Turn_Based_Combat | Developers=Companies/Balcony_Team | Franchises= | Genres=Genres/Role_Playing | Locations= | Objects= | Platforms=Platforms/PC | Publishers=Companies/Balcony_Team | Games= | Themes=Themes/Fantasy | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/33/338034/3305784-8744677130-libra.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3305784-8744677130-libra.jpg","path":"33\/338034\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"screen_kubrick,scale_super,scale_tiny,square_medium,scale_avatar,scale_small,square_tiny,square_small,scale_medium,screen_medium,scale_large,square_mini,square_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Balrum is an old-school, turn-based, open world RPG with deep tactical combat. Explore a huge living fantasy world with dozens of side quests next to an epic main quest. In addition to traditional RPG features Balrum has deep crafting which allows the player to craft their own custom items. Balrum also features farming your own crops, building your home, and survival mechanics complemented by the game's main features. In Balrum you will have a faithful animal companion as your pet. Your pet is fully controllable and adds greatly to the complexity of the combat.
The player takes control of a young man whose peaceful life is suddenly interrupted by events which will change his life forever.
==Features:== * Real-Time world with Turn-Based Combat * A huge Open World with dozens of Dungeons to explore * Spend your learning points to create a pure class or a hybrid class * Dozens of Side Quests and an Epic Main Quest * Three separate paths leading to the end * Building * Farming * Tame various animals to be your loyal Companion * Deep Crafting System which allows you to create custom items * Day/Night Cycle with Weather Effects * Survival Mechanics
==Story== It's twenty years after your village fled the kingdom and took refuge in Darkwood. You always knew that these woods hold dark secrets but now you start to feel it's evil on your own skin. Horrible things are happening. You discover fragments of the woods dark history and come to the conclusion that you have to leave your home. You know in your heart that once you step out of the protection of the place where you grown up, nothing will be the same. You have to face a world that's in chaos. A world without laws. Nevertheless you feel something else too. You feel freedom. A completely new world awaits you to explore it, but the feeling quickly turns into guilt. There are people in Darkwood who are counting on your help. You are their last hope.

{{Game |Guid=dcc5cddb-553e-4e92-a909-c9e983054559 |Name=Bancho the Chef |Image=Bancho.jpg |Deck=A prequel to Dave the Diver. |ReleaseDateType=Full |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Prequel, Concepts/Cooking |Developers=Companies/Mintrocket |Franchises=Franchises/Dave the Diver |Genres=Genres/Simulation |Locations=Locations/Japan, Locations/South Korea, Locations/China, Locations/Asia |Platforms=Platforms/PlayStation 5 |Publishers=Companies/Mintrocket }}
